list.name: group
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id AS __value FROM watchlist_groups ORDER BY sort_order, name

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', tr.timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS time, t.name AS metric, tr.value AS value FROM tag_readings tr JOIN tags t ON t.id = tr.tag_id WHERE tr.tag_id IN (SELECT tag_id FROM watchlist_group_members WHERE group_id = $group) AND tr.timestamp >= datetime('now','-6 hours') ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', tr.timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS time, t.name AS metric, tr.value AS value FROM tag_readings tr JOIN tags t ON t.id = tr.tag_id WHERE tr.tag_id IN (SELECT tag_id FROM watchlist_group_members WHERE group_id = $group) AND tr.timestamp >= datetime('now','-6 hours') ORDER BY time
